⚡ AuraLite — Recorded Replay Viewer (Engine-Generated Trajectories)

RECORDED REPLAY — NOT LIVE SIMULATION REAL STATE HASHES

Watermark Declaration

This HTML viewer plays back engine-recorded per-frame trajectories and real 64-bit state hashes produced by cargo run -p auralite-sandbox --release. No physics executes in JavaScript. All numbers are from Rust engine execution. See docs/generated/scenes.html regeneration in crates/auralite-sandbox/src/main.rs + replay.rs.

Provenance

Generated by auralite-sandbox headless runner. Each frame's body positions and hash are from World2::state_hash() / World3::state_hash() during real stepping. No pseudo-hash, no counter*1337. Regenerate via: cargo run -p auralite-sandbox --release → docs/generated/scenes.html (single canonical path).
